full_name: Securities and Exchange Board of India
correct_usage_example: Drafted SEBI filing for preferential allotment under ICDR Regulations
notes: Primary securities regulator. Mention alone is shallow. Must be in transaction or regulatory context to score high.

full_name: SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018
correct_usage_example: Assisted in drafting risk factors section of DRHP under Schedule VI of ICDR Regulations, 2018
notes: Core regulation governing IPOs, rights issues, and preferential allotments. Contextual use is high signal for CapM knowledge.

full_name: SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
correct_usage_example: Prepared LODR compliance checklist for a newly listed entity post-IPO
notes: Governs ongoing disclosure obligations of listed companies. Correct usage shows understanding of post-listing compliance.

correct_usage_example: Assisted in drafting of DRHP including risk factors, litigation disclosures, and financial statements section
notes: The primary disclosure document filed with SEBI before an IPO. Drafting involvement is very strong signal.

correct_usage_example: Reviewed Red Herring Prospectus for compliance with ICDR disclosure norms
notes: Filed after SEBI observations on DRHP. Equivalent signal to DRHP involvement.

correct_usage_example: Advised on end-to-end IPO process including DRHP drafting, SEBI filing, and listing agreement
notes: Core Capital Markets transaction. Mention alone is not enough — the work described matters.

full_name: Small and Medium Enterprise Initial Public Offering
correct_usage_example: Assisted in DRHP preparation for SME IPO on NSE Emerge platform
notes: IPOs on NSE Emerge or BSE SME platforms. Valid CapM transaction — narrower than mainboard IPO but genuine experience.

correct_usage_example: Assisted in QIP of listed company — drafted placement document and reviewed institutional investor agreements
notes: Capital raising by listed companies to qualified institutional buyers. Strong CapM signal.

correct_usage_example: Assisted in drafting of letter of offer for rights issue under ICDR Regulations
notes: Offering of securities to existing shareholders. Governed by ICDR. Valid CapM transaction type.

correct_usage_example: Advised on FEMA compliance for FPI investment in the QIP and reviewed RBI approvals
notes: Governs cross-border transactions and foreign investment. Relevant for FPI participation in Indian capital markets.

correct_usage_example: Drafted FPI registration documents and reviewed SEBI FPI Regulations for compliance
notes: Foreign institutional investors registered with SEBI. Common in QIPs and secondary market transactions.

correct_usage_example: Assisted in price band determination and book building process management for mainboard IPO
notes: Price discovery mechanism for IPOs. Knowledge shows understanding of the mechanics of public issues.

correct_usage_example: Reviewed anchor investor allocation process and lock-in requirements under ICDR Regulations
notes: Qualified institutional buyer allocated shares before IPO opens. Governed by ICDR. Knowledge shows IPO process depth.

correct_usage_example: Drafted escrow agreement and reviewed ASBA process compliance for IPO proceeds
notes: Account holding IPO application monies. Part of ASBA mechanism. Knowledge shows operational CapM depth.

correct_usage_example: Reviewed ASBA compliance requirements and self-certified syndicate bank obligations
notes: IPO application mechanism. Shows operational knowledge of primary market processes.

correct_usage_example: Conducted legal due diligence on target company for IPO — reviewed material contracts, litigation, and regulatory approvals
notes: Core transactional process. Drafting of due diligence reports is high signal. Vague assistance mention is low signal.

correct_usage_example: Reviewed listing agreement and post-listing compliance obligations under LODR
notes: Agreement between the company and the stock exchange at time of listing. Post-LODR, much of this is subsumed into LODR compliance.

correct_usage_example: Advised merchant banker on SEBI filing obligations and issue management responsibilities under ICDR
notes: Lead manager in IPO process. Understanding of merchant banker obligations shows CapM process knowledge.

correct_usage_example: Drafted board and shareholder resolutions for preferential allotment under ICDR and Companies Act 2013
notes: Allotment of securities to select investors. Governed by ICDR and Companies Act. Common in PE/VC investments in listed companies.

correct_usage_example: Drafted sections of the offer document including risk factors, litigation disclosures, and use of proceeds
notes: Umbrella term for prospectus, information memorandum etc. Specific drafting work is high signal.

correct_usage_example: Assisted in SME IPO listing on NSE Emerge — prepared application and reviewed exchange eligibility criteria
notes: SME listing platform of NSE. Knowledge shows awareness of SME Capital Markets.

correct_usage_example: Assisted in migration from BSE SME to mainboard — reviewed eligibility criteria and prepared migration application
notes: SME listing platform of BSE. Equivalent to NSE Emerge.

correct_usage_example: Reviewed board composition requirements and audit committee obligations under Companies Act 2013 for IPO readiness
notes: Primary corporate statute. Adjacent to CapM but not core CapM. Mention in IPO-readiness or listing context scores higher than standalone mention.

correct_usage_example: Assisted in NCLT filing for scheme of arrangement preceding the company's IPO
notes: Tribunal for corporate disputes and restructuring. Relevant for pre-IPO restructuring matters.

correct_usage_example: Assisted in issuance of non-convertible debentures — drafted information memorandum and reviewed SEBI NCS Regulations
notes: Bond and debenture issuances. Strong CapM signal alongside equity markets knowledge.

correct_usage_example: Reviewed NCD trust deed and debenture trustee obligations under SEBI NCS Regulations
notes: Common debt capital markets instrument. Knowledge shows awareness of both equity and debt CapM.
